findings.issue: Closeout listed this independent audit artifact before the file existed.
findings.resolution: Created the independent audit artifact and updated closeout status.

checks.name: browser_origin_arbitrary_paths
checks.evidence: Decision matrix explicitly forbids arbitrary browser path/source-dir/app path submission and limits future path handling to server-owned locations, command-owned ids, or future desktop/native picker after approval.

checks.name: direct_state_log_config_reads
checks.evidence: Artifacts do not admit direct state/log/config/runtime parsing as UI truth and align with UI_READINESS_SPEC.md primary truth restrictions.

checks.name: new_command_surfaces
checks.evidence: Artifacts classify missing setup/select/import operations as needs_command_api_contour or deferred rather than inventing UI command surfaces.

checks.name: desktop_native_picker_boundary
checks.evidence: Artifacts defer native picker behavior to a future desktop phase after owner approval.

checks.name: runtime_py_scope
checks.evidence: Artifacts do not require or admit runtime.py edits.

checks.name: external_reference_trace_scan
checks.evidence: Auditor found no external reference service traces or token-ish strings in the three contour artifacts.

residual_risks.risk: The source package path is recorded as local provenance in the decision matrix.
residual_risks.disposition: Accepted. It is not browser-origin payload and is needed to identify the owner-provided render baseline.

residual_risks.risk: Future implementation may be tempted to reuse launch client as path verification.
residual_risks.disposition: Blocked by decision matrix and screen passports; future contour must preserve launch-client dispatch-only semantics.
